data.title: SG Fleet Group Secures OIO Approval for Acquisition
data.description:
An update from SG Fleet Group Ltd. ( (AU:SGF) ) is now available.

SG Fleet Group Limited has received approval from the Overseas Investment Office for its acquisition by Westmann Bidco Pty Limited, a move backed by Pacific Equity Partners. This approval is a significant step forward in the acquisition process, which still requires shareholder and court approvals. The SG Fleet Board has recommended shareholders vote in favor of the scheme, highlighting its potential benefits and aligning with the company’s strategic goals.

More about SG Fleet Group Ltd.

SG Fleet Group Limited operates in the fleet management and leasing industry, providing vehicle leasing and fleet management services. The company focuses on offering comprehensive solutions for corporate and government clients, enhancing their operational efficiency and reducing costs.

YTD Price Performance: 1.47%

Average Trading Volume: 395,250

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$1.18B

data.title: Drax Group Announces Change in Major Holdings
data.description:
Drax Group plc ( (GB:DRX) ) has shared an announcement.

Drax Group PLC, a UK-based company, has announced a change in its major holdings due to an acquisition or disposal of financial instruments by Bank of America Corporation. The notification reveals a decrease in the percentage of voting rights held through financial instruments, impacting the company’s shareholder structure. This adjustment in holdings may influence Drax Group’s strategic decisions and market positioning, as it reflects a shift in the influence of a significant stakeholder.

data.title: China Communications Services Announces Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
China Communications Services ( (HK:0552) ) has provided an update.

China Communications Services Corporation Limited has announced a final cash dividend of RMB 0.2187 per share for the financial year ending December 31, 2024, with the payment date set for August 15, 2025. This announcement reflects the company’s commitment to returning value to its shareholders and may have implications for its financial performance and attractiveness to investors, particularly in the context of its tax arrangements for non-resident shareholders.

More about China Communications Services

China Communications Services Corporation Limited operates in the communications industry, providing services such as telecommunications infrastructure services, business process outsourcing, and applications, content, and other services. The company primarily focuses on the Chinese market, serving major telecommunications operators, government agencies, and other enterprises.

data.title: Wallbridge Mining Unveils Promising PEA for Fenelon Gold Project
data.description:
Wallbridge Mng Co ( (TSE:WM) ) has issued an update.

Wallbridge Mining has completed an updated Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) for its Fenelon Gold Project, revealing promising economic prospects. The PEA outlines an average annual gold production of 107,000 ounces over a 16-year mine life, with an after-tax net present value of $706 million and an internal rate of return of 21%. The assessment suggests a robust path to development with lower startup capital and higher grade scenarios, positioning the project favorably in the current high gold price environment. The company plans to rapidly advance the project, considering expansion options post-payback, aiming to enhance shareholder value.

More about Wallbridge Mng Co

Wallbridge Mining Company Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on gold exploration and development. The company is engaged in advancing its projects located in the Abitibi Greenstone Belt, with a particular emphasis on the Fenelon Gold Project in Quebec, Canada.

YTD Price Performance: -3.33%

Average Trading Volume: 472,468

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$63.79M

data.title: Noble Corporation Announces Board Changes for 2025
data.description:
Noble Corporation PLC Class A ( (NE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 24, 2025, Noble Corporation plc announced that Mr. Alastair Maxwell and Ms. Ann D. Pickard will not stand for re-election at the 2025 Annual General Meeting, leading to a reduction in the board size to seven directors. Their decision was amicable and not due to any disagreements, and their contributions were acknowledged as pivotal in the company’s strategic transformation, including successful acquisitions and a leading capital return program.

data.title: Medtecs Submits Debt Claim Amid Subsidiary’s Winding-Up Process
data.description:
Medtecs International Corporation Ltd. ( (SG:546) ) has shared an announcement.

Medtecs International Corporation Ltd. has submitted a proof of debt claim amounting to approximately US$29.9 million to the Liquidator as part of the winding-up process of its subsidiary, Resilient Medical. The financial impact of this court order on Medtecs’ assets and earnings per share is still being assessed, with further announcements to be made as developments occur.

More about Medtecs International Corporation Ltd.

Medtecs International Corporation Ltd. is a company incorporated in Bermuda, operating in the healthcare sector. It is involved in the production and distribution of medical supplies and personal protective equipment, with a focus on the Asian market.

data.title: Greatview Aseptic Packaging Announces Major Board Reshuffle
data.description:
Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) just unveiled an update.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited announced the results of an extraordinary general meeting held on March 27, 2025, where several significant changes to the board were approved. The meeting resulted in the removal of four directors and the appointment of six new directors, reflecting a complete overhaul of the company’s board. This strategic move is likely to impact the company’s governance and potentially its market positioning, signaling a shift in its operational focus and strategy.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited operates in the packaging industry, specializing in aseptic packaging solutions. The company focuses on providing innovative and efficient packaging products primarily for the food and beverage sectors.
